title: Fictionally Created
description: This pack is meant to be close to vanilla while including some engineering, exploration, and farming content in the mix.
body:
The primary goal of this pack is to expand and enhance the vanilla experience, while also integrating Create and others into that experience. Many other mods are included (check the mod-list to see if your favorites are included!), however! Most of all though, players are encouraged to do as many different things in a single save as they can (End Remastered specifically helps facilitate this by necessitating a certain degree of exploration). Suggestions are welcome!

~~**PLEASE NOTE: The pack download is currently being fixed.** Until it is fixed in the next update, downloads are likely to fail as the pack file for current version seems to have issues completing its installation. After the pack has been fixed, I have no plans at the moment to add any more content; future updates will be limited to bugfixes/compatibility.~~

NOTE 2:
I won't be updating this pack any further. I just don't have the motivation for it. If anyone else does though feel free.

The following mods are used from CurseForge:

[Structory: Towers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory-towers) by botanydev

[Bedrock Breakers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bedrock-breakers) by XanthianZ

[Advanced Compass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-compass) by dmitrylovin
